items.docs: Search for companies using criteria such as company name, domain, industry, location, revenue range, employee count, and technology stack. Returns paginated results with company identifiers for further research.

Research a specific company using a search result ID from /companies/search, or by providing direct identifiers such as domain or company name. Returns comprehensive company profiles including firmographics, technology stack, funding data, and key contacts.

Enrich an existing company record with updated or missing firmographic data. Provide known company identifiers and receive back verified company information including revenue, employee count, industry classification, and technology stack.
